reported_entities.name: GLEIF (Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation)

notes: Salva run_discovery reported retrieval_health='ok' but qualified_count=0 -- zero entities passed qualification, so no candidate list was returned by Salva even after the scoring-layer bug fix.
